title: Scale CloudNative-PG PostgreSQL to 3 replicas, enable PgBouncer, and configure automated backups
subtasks: Edit the CloudNative-PG Cluster CR to set spec.instances: 3 (1 primary, 2 replicas) for high availability.

Deploy PgBouncer as a sidecar or separate Deployment in the databases namespace, configure connection pooling for all application clients, and update the sigma1-infra-endpoints ConfigMap with the PgBouncer service endpoint.
Configure automated daily backups in the CNPG Cluster CR: set spec.backup.schedule to daily, and enable WAL archiving to an S3-compatible Cloudflare R2 bucket (spec.backup.barmanObjectStore).
Verify WAL archiving is active and backup jobs are completing successfully.
Document failover and restore procedures in the ops runbook.

title: Scale Valkey to 3 replicas with Redis Sentinel and configure maxmemory policy
subtasks: Update the Valkey (Opstree Redis) CR to use 3 replicas and enable Redis Sentinel for automatic failover.
Configure the maxmemory policy to 'allkeys-lru' and set a memory limit appropriate for production workloads.
Update the sigma1-infra-endpoints ConfigMap to point to the Sentinel-managed endpoint.
Test failover by simulating a pod failure and verifying automatic leader election.
Document Sentinel endpoints and failover behavior for application teams.

title: Configure TLS certificates via cert-manager and production Ingress controller
subtasks: Install cert-manager in the cluster if not already present.
Create ClusterIssuer for Let's Encrypt (or internal CA if required).
Update all Ingress resources to use TLS with cert-manager annotations.
Deploy or update the Ingress controller (NGINX or Envoy) for production-grade configuration: enable HTTP/2, set secure ciphers, and enforce HTTPS redirect.
Test certificate issuance and renewal for all public endpoints.

title: Configure Cloudflare CDN for static assets and R2 integration
subtasks: Set up Cloudflare CDN rules for the R2 bucket used for static assets and user-uploaded content.
Update DNS and CNAME records to point to the Cloudflare-protected endpoints.
Configure cache rules and access policies for R2-backed assets.
Test asset delivery via CDN and verify cache headers and performance.
Document CDN endpoint URLs for application teams.

title: Enforce network policies restricting pod-to-pod traffic
subtasks: Author and apply Kubernetes NetworkPolicy or CiliumNetworkPolicy resources for each namespace to restrict pod-to-pod communication to only what is required (e.g., only allow application pods to connect to database and cache pods).
Deny all ingress and egress by default except for explicitly allowed flows.
Test policy enforcement by attempting unauthorized pod-to-pod connections and verifying they are blocked.
Document allowed network flows and update diagrams/runbooks.

title: Configure OpenTelemetry collector, persistent Jaeger storage, and SLO alert rules
subtasks: Deploy OpenTelemetry Collector as a DaemonSet or Deployment with production sampling rates (e.g., 10% or as specified in SRE guidelines).
Deploy Jaeger with persistent storage (e.g., backed by a PVC or external storage) to retain traces for at least 7 days.
Configure exporters to send traces to Jaeger and metrics to Prometheus.
Define and apply Prometheus alert rules for SLO violations (e.g., p99 latency, error rate, pod availability).
Test trace collection and alert firing by simulating SLO breaches.
